The white line shrank from 48 to 46 pixels. The blue circle is still at [[23,31] to [31,37]]. The magenta squares are still at their positions.
I need to figure out what the goal is. The level has:
- Top left has 4 colored squares: sky blue, magenta, purple, yellow
- Top bar has a yellow square
- Center has a blue circle
- Center has a blue circle
-  - Magenta squares scattered around
  - White line at bottom
The game mechanic seems to be: click on the sky blue dots to turn them into magenta squares. But the level isn't completed yet.
Maybe I need to click on the colored squares in the top left corner? Or maybe I need to click on the yellow square in the top bar?
Let me try clicking on the yellow square in the top bar (ID=6, at [[3,30] to [6,33]).

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 4, 'col': 31}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
